top_signals.title: Brewdog founder James Watt launches ‘equity punk’ comeback
top_signals.summary: Brewdog founder James Watt has launched a comeback after the craft beer firm he co-founded collapsed earlier this year.  Watt said on Friday he will launch Second Best, a new crowdfunded beer venture, in a bid to win back the “equity punks” who were left empty handed in Brewdog’s sale. The divisive entrepreneur said he [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
